subcodes.first_line: O true servant of the Blessed Beauty! Ever are the writings of that true friend a source of joy. The letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال مبارک همواره محررات آندوست حقیقی سبب مسراتست مکتوبیکه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat]
